'''鈭歯g-p-n''' ('''kangapan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precept|precept]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precept|precept]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| kangapan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingapan|thingapan]] || [[word:jingapan|jingapan]] || [[word:shingapan|shingapan]] || [[word:kingapan|kingapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungapan|thuthungapan]] || [[word:jujungapan|jujungapan]] || [[word:shushungapan|shushungapan]] || [[word:kukungapan|kukungapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungapan|thungapan]] || [[word:jungapan|jungapan]] || [[word:shungapan|shungapan]] || [[word:kungapan|kungapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungapan|thungapan]] || [[word:jungapan|jungapan]] || [[word:shungapan|shungapan]] || [[word:kungapan|kungapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengapan|thengapan]] || [[word:jengapan|jengapan]] || [[word:shengapan|shengapan]] || [[word:kengapan|kengapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongapan|thothongapan]] || [[word:jojongapan|jojongapan]] || [[word:shoshongapan|shoshongapan]] || [[word:kokongapan|kokongapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongapan|thongapan]] || [[word:jongapan|jongapan]] || [[word:shongapan|shongapan]] || [[word:kongapan|kongapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongapan|thongapan]] || [[word:jongapan|jongapan]] || [[word:shongapan|shongapan]] || [[word:kongapan|kongapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngapan|th忙ngapan]] || [[word:j忙ngapan|j忙ngapan]] || [[word:sh忙ngapan|sh忙ngapan]] || [[word:k忙ngapan|k忙ngapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangapan|thathangapan]] || [[word:jajangapan|jajangapan]] || [[word:shashangapan|shashangapan]] || [[word:kakangapan|kakangapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangapan|thangapan]] || [[word:jangapan|jangapan]] || [[word:shangapan|shangapan]] || [[word:kangapan|kangapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangapan|thangapan]] || [[word:jangapan|jangapan]] || [[word:shangapan|shangapan]] || [[word:kangapan|kangapan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangapan|shangapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangapan|goshangapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangapan|gokishangapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangapan眉|shangapan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangapankn眉|goshangapankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapan眉|gokishangapan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangapansh毛|shangapansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangapanksh毛|goshangapanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangapansh毛|gokishangapansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapanro|shangapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapankro|goshangapankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapanro|gokishangapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapanmu|shangapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapankmu|goshangapankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapanmu|gokishangapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangapansher|shangapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangapanksher|goshangapanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangapansher|gokishangapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangapang|shangapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangapankng|goshangapankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangapang|gokishangapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangapanya|shangapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangapankya|goshangapankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangapanya|gokishangapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangapanyam|shangapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangapankyam|goshangapankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangapanyam|gokishangapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapan眉sh毛|shangapan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapankn眉sh毛|goshangapankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapan眉sh毛|gokishangapan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapan眉ro|shangapan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapankn眉ro|goshangapankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapan眉ro|gokishangapan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapan眉mu|shangapan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapankn眉mu|goshangapankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapan眉mu|gokishangapan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapansh毛n眉|shangapansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapanksh毛n眉|goshangapanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapansh毛n眉|gokishangapansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapansh毛ro|shangapansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapanksh毛ro|goshangapanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapansh毛ro|gokishangapansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapansh毛mu|shangapansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapanksh毛mu|goshangapanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapansh毛mu|gokishangapansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapanron眉|shangapanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapankron眉|goshangapankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapanron眉|gokishangapanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapanrosh毛|shangapanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapankrosh毛|goshangapankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapanrosh毛|gokishangapanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapanromu|shangapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapankromu|goshangapankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapanromu|gokishangapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapanmun眉|shangapanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapankmun眉|goshangapankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapanmun眉|gokishangapanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapanmush毛|shangapanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapankmush毛|goshangapankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapanmush毛|gokishangapanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapanmuro|shangapanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapankmuro|goshangapankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapanmuro|gokishangapanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5445898}}
